debug_info.goal:
α : Type u_1
β : Type u_2
γ : Type u_3
δ : Type u_4
mα : MeasurableSpace α
μ : Measure α
mβ : MeasurableSpace β
mγ : MeasurableSpace γ
mδ : MeasurableSpace δ
inst✝⁷ : StandardBorelSpace α
inst✝⁶ : StandardBorelSpace β
inst✝⁵ : Nonempty β
inst✝⁴ : StandardBorelSpace γ
inst✝³ : Nonempty γ
inst✝² : StandardBorelSpace δ
inst✝¹ : Nonempty δ
inst✝ : IsFiniteMeasure μ
X : α → β
Y : α → γ
Z : α → δ
hX : Measurable X
hY : Measurable Y
hZ : Measurable Z
h : CondIndepFun (MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance) ⋯ X Y μ
⊢ CondIndepFun (MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance) ⋯ X (fun ω => (Y ω, Z ω)) μ

failed_attempts:
rw [condIndepFun_iff] at h ⊢
  filter_upwards [h, MeasureTheory.ae_condExpKernel_of_measurable μ hZ] with a ha hZa
  refine IndepFun.congr ?_ ?_ (IndepFun.comp ha measurable_id (measurable_id.prod_mk measurable_const))
  · exact Filter.Eventually.of_forall fun _ ↦ rfl
  · filter_upwards [hZa] with ω hω; simp [hω]

rw [condIndepFun_iff hX hY hZ] at h
  rw [condIndepFun_iff hX (hY.prod_mk hZ) hZ]
  filter_upwards [h, condDistrib_ae_eq hZ μ] with z hz hZ_eq
  exact (hz.comp measurable_id (measurable_id.prod_mk measurable_const)).congr_right (by
    filter_upwards [hZ_eq] with ω hω
    simp [hω])

  filter_upwards [h, h_ae] with a ha hZa
  apply IndepFun.congr (IndepFun.comp ha (Measurable.prod_mk measurable_id measurable_const)) .rfl
  filter_upwards [hZa] with ω hω
  simp [hω]

  filter_upwards [h, ae_eq_condexpKernel_of_measurable hZ'] with ω h_indep h_const
  apply IndepFun.congr (h_indep.comp measurable_id (by fun_prop)) (EventuallyEq.refl _ _)
  filter_upwards [h_const] with a ha

  · exact hz_indep.comp measurable_id (measurable_id.prod_mk measurable_const)

rw [condIndepFun_iff] at h ⊢
  let mZ := MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance
  filter_upwards [h] with ω hω
  have hZ_const : Z =ᵐ[condExpKernel mZ μ ω] fun _ ↦ Z ω := by
    rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff, Measure.measure_compl (hZ (measurable_set_singleton _))]
    rw [condExpKernel_apply_mem mZ μ _ ⟨{Z ω}, measurable_set_singleton _, rfl⟩]
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, Set.mem_singleton_iff, if_true, sub_self]
  apply IndepFun.ae_eq (IndepFun.comp hω measurable_id (measurable_prod_mk_right (Z ω)))
  · exact Filter.EventuallyEq.rfl
  · filter_upwards [hZ_const] with a ha
    simp only [ha]

  rw [MeasurableSpace.comap_prod]
  exact CondIndep.sup_right h le_rfl

    filter_upwards [h_eq] with ω hω using by simp [hω]
  rw [IndepFun.congr_right this]
  exact IndepFun.comp hz (by fun_prop) (by fun_prop)

  filter_upwards [h, Measure.condExpKernel_ae_eq_const hZ'] with ω h_indep h_eq

  have h_ae : ∀ᵐ ω ∂μ, ∀ᵐ ω' ∂(condExpKernel μ (MeasurableSpace.comap Z mδ) ω),

  filter_upwards [h, h_ae] with ω h_indep h_const

rw [CondIndepFun] at h ⊢
  have hZ' := Measure.ae_condKernel_eq_of_measurable hZ
  filter_upwards [h, hZ'] with a ha hZa
  rw [Kernel.IndepFun, indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul] at ha ⊢
  intro s t hs ht
  let t' := {y | (y, Z a) ∈ t}
  have ht' : MeasurableSet t' := ht.preimage (measurable_id.prod_mk measurable_const)
  specialize ha s t' hs ht'
  rw [← ha]
  congr 1
  · apply measure_congr
    filter_upwards [hZa] with ω hω
    simp only [Set.mem_inter_iff, Set.mem_preimage, hω, t']
  · apply measure_congr
    filter_upwards [hZa] with ω hω
    simp only [Set.mem_preimage, hω, t']

rw [CondIndepFun] at h ⊢
  refine Kernel.IndepFun.of_ae_eq h ?_
  filter_upwards [condexpKernel_map_apply_eq_dirac hZ] with z hz h_indep
  have : Z =ᵐ[condexpKernel μ Z z] fun _ => z := by
    rw [Filter.EventuallyEq, ae_iff, ← Measure.map_apply hZ (measurableSet_singleton z), hz,
      Measure.dirac_apply_singleton]
  refine IndepFun.of_ae_eq (h_indep.comp measurable_id (measurable_id.prod_mk measurable_const)) ?_
  filter_upwards [this] with x hx
  simp [hx]

rw [CondIndepFun, MeasurableSpace.comap_prod]
  exact CondIndep.sup_right_of_le le_rfl h

rw [CondIndepFun, MeasurableSpace.comap_prod]
  exact h.sup_right

rw [condIndepFun_iff] at h ⊢
  let π := Set.image2 (fun s t ↦ s ×ˢ t) {s | MeasurableSet s} {t | MeasurableSet t}
  have hπ : IsPiSystem π := by
    rintro s ⟨A, hA, B, hB, rfl⟩ t ⟨C, hC, D, hD, rfl⟩ _
    exact ⟨A ∩ C, hA.inter hC, B ∩ D, hB.inter hD, Set.prod_inter_prod _ _ _ _⟩
  have hgen : MeasurableSpace.generateFrom π = MeasurableSpace.prod mγ mδ :=
    MeasurableSpace.generateFrom_prod_eq
  rw [Kernel.indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul_pi _ _ isPiSystem_measurableSet hπ
    MeasurableSpace.generateFrom_measurableSet hgen hX (Measurable.prod hY hZ)]
  rintro s hs t ⟨A, hA, B, hB, rfl⟩
  simp only [Set.preimage_prod_eq_inter, Set.preimage_inter, Set.inter_assoc]
  have hB_cond : Z ⁻¹' B ∈ MeasurableSpace.comap Z inferInstance := ⟨B, hB, rfl⟩
  filter_upwards [Kernel.condExpKernel_ae_eq_indicator (Measurable.comap_le hZ) hB_cond (X ⁻¹' s ∩ Y ⁻¹' A),
    Kernel.condExpKernel_ae_eq_indicator (Measurable.comap_le hZ) hB_cond (Y ⁻¹' A),
    (Kernel.indepFun_iff_measure_inter_preimage_eq_mul.1 h) s A hs hA] with ω h1 h2 h3
  rw [h1, h3, h2, mul_assoc, mul_comm (condExpKernel (Measurable.comap_le hZ) μ ω (X ⁻¹' s))]

filter_upwards [h, condDist_ae_eq_const hZ] with z hz hZz
  refine IndepFun.congr_right (hz.comp measurable_id (measurable_id.prod_mk measurable_const)) ?_
  filter_upwards [hZz] with ω hω
  simp [hω]
